name: PDF ↔ Image Converter
description: Convert PDF pages to PNG or JPEG images, and combine multiple images into a single PDF.

name: Image Tools
description: Resize, compress, and convert images between PNG, JPEG, WEBP, and BMP.

name: QR Code Generator
description: Generate QR codes for URLs, text, or anything. Download as PNG.

name: CSV / Excel Viewer
description: Upload and browse CSV or Excel files as a searchable, paginated table.

name: Text Diff
description: Compare two blocks of text side-by-side with highlighted added and removed lines.

name: Base64 Tool
description: Encode and decode text or files to and from Base64.

name: JSON Formatter
description: Prettify, minify, and validate JSON. Spot errors instantly.

name: Hash Generator
description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 hashes from text or uploaded files.

name: Regex Tester
description: Test Python regular expressions with live match highlighting and group capture.

name: Color Picker
description: Pick colors and convert between HEX, RGB, and HSL. Generate tints and shades.

name: JWT Decoder
description: Paste a JWT to decode the header and payload. Shows expiry status instantly.

name: Timestamp Converter
description: Convert Unix timestamps to human-readable dates and back, with a live clock.

name: Number Base Converter
description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal in real time.

name: URL Parser
description: Parse URLs into components, encode/decode query strings, and build URLs visually.

name: Markdown Editor
description: Write Markdown with a live preview side-by-side. Download as HTML.

name: Word Counter
description: Count words, characters, sentences and get reading time and word frequency stats.

name: Password Generator
description: Generate secure passwords with configurable length and character sets.

name: Unit Converter
description: Convert length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed, and time units.

name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
description: Generate placeholder text by paragraphs, sentences, or words. Copy or download.

name: Notepad
description: A simple persistent scratchpad. Auto-saves to your browser as you type.
